title: Easy Farming
description: Right-click harvest, auto-replanting, and easier vanilla farmer.
body:
Easy Farming makes crop harvesting faster and less repetitive actions.

  Harvest mature crops with right-click, automatically replant them

  ## Supported crops

  - Wheat
  - Carrots
  - Potatoes
  - Beetroot
  - Nether Wart
  - Cocoa
  - Torchflower
  - Sugar Cane
  - Cactus
  - Bamboo
  - Kelp
